caption: A person's hands are seen placing a sports card into a clear plastic protective case on a table. The setting appears to be a hobby shop or a home studio, with several stacks of card boxes in the background. A small inset video in the lower right shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap watching the process. On the table is a black mat with the orange and white logo "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" visible. Throughout the sequence, the person's hands carefully slide the card into the plastic sleeve, guiding it from the top down until it is seated. A blue cardboard box rests to the left of the action. The scene is captured from a close-up perspective, focusing on the manual task of casing the card.
